use_cases: Displaying incident response metrics like Mean Time to Respond in monitoring dashboards
Visualizing incident trends over time with area charts for service reliability teams
Showing critical vs improvement status badges for incident management workflows
Providing at-a-glance service health metrics for DevOps and SRE teams
Dashboard component for tracking team incident response performance
ai_summary: A monitoring dashboard component for displaying incident response metrics and trends. Features animated counters, area charts for visualizing incident frequency over time, and metric cards with critical/improvement status badges. Built with reaviz for charts and framer-motion for subtle animations. Designed for service reliability and incident management use cases in SaaS and DevOps contexts.
